name: Trendline Kitten Food - Chicken 1kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural kitten food with chicken protein, brewer's yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all kittens.
description: Trendline Kitten Food -Chicken , fully balanced all-natural cat food with chicken protein, brewer's yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...............................27% Fat ....................................10% Crude Ash ........................ 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)....... 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Why Choose Trendline Kitten Chicken? 27% Chicken Protein – fuels muscle growth and playful energy. 10% Healthy Fats – support brain development and a silky coat. Brewer’s Yeast – enhances immunity and supports digestion. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – for skin health and reduced shedding. Taurine Added – critical for healthy heart and eyesight development. Feeding Guide Provide the recommended daily portion based on your kitten’s age and weight. Always ensure fresh water is available.
